calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-30-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Petitioner: Connie Chan, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Tabitha Wai Kiu Wong and Tattie Wai Ming Wong, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Tabitha MacKenzie Wong and Tobian Jade Wong.
Decree signed in open court.
